race.comment: HELIGAN (12) is still a maiden but has a handful of efforts that would make him very competitive in this line-up. Has been working home well late after hitting flat spots, so the rise to 1800m could bring out the best of him. TIME FOR SNOW (14) was only beaten a lip in his first two runs back before sticking on soundly into second last time at Goulburn on a tricky track. Peaking now and is drawn favourably. Don't overlook. MICHELANGELO (4) got too far back on debut but lengthened nicely in the late stages to finish midfield. Is sure to have come on from that but is likely to get a long way back again from his draw. Will be hoping they overdo it early so he can launch late. TREASURE HUNTER (5) has good tactical speed and will give backers a sight fourth-up.
